menu_option_descriptions.learn: Listen for handheld remote packets and derive the permanent remote profile automatically.
menu_option_descriptions.manual: Enter the permanent remote ID and learned C/D values directly.

manual.title: Manual fireplace profile
manual.description: Enter the permanent learned remote profile for one Proflame2 fireplace.

learn.title: Learn fireplace profile
learn.description: Choose the controller type to use for guided learning. After this step, listening starts automatically. The fireplace does not need to start in any specific state. The integration will guide you through a small sequence of button presses so it can confirm one stable remote profile.

learn_features.title: Select supported features
learn_features.description: Learning found the permanent remote profile. Select the fireplace features that should be enabled.

learn_failed.title: Learning did not complete
learn_failed.description:
Guided learning could not produce a trustworthy remote profile.

Reason: {error}

menu_option_descriptions.retry_learn: Start guided learning again with the same backend.
menu_option_descriptions.manual: Enter the permanent remote profile yourself instead.

progress.learn_remote:
Listening with {backend_name}.

**Do this now:**
**{instruction}**

This step times out after 2 minutes if no packet is observed. Close this dialog to cancel listening.

error.invalid_remote_id: Remote ID must be a 24-bit hexadecimal value.
error.invalid_nibble: C and D values must be integers from 0 to 15.
error.invalid_profile: The saved profile contains an invalid fireplace state.
error.duplicate_profile_id: A saved profile with that name already exists.

abort.already_configured: A fireplace with this remote ID is already configured for this controller.

error.invalid_profile: The saved profile contains an invalid fireplace state.
error.duplicate_profile_id: A saved profile with that name already exists.

add_profile.title: Add saved profile
add_profile.description: Saved profiles are the normal user-facing way to apply a complete fireplace state.
